# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest version of Streamer is the only version that is supported, as it is the only version that is being actively developed.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

You can contact the Streamer maintainers to report a vulnerability:

- Report the vulnerability in the [Streamer Fluxer server](https://fluxer.gg/rEBQ3B8E)

Fluxer is an OSS Discord alternative
